action_set_definitions.name: get_vehicle_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of the vehicle, including battery level and current location ID.

action_set_definitions.name: query_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the cargo hold to return a list of all packages and their metadata.

action_set_definitions.name: geocode_delivery_node
action_set_definitions.description: Resolves a text-based address or access instruction to a specific, historically corrected navigable node ID to avoid congestion.

location_string.description: The full address and access details (e.g., '900 N Michigan Ave (ACCESS VIA WALTON ST)').

action_set_definitions.name: execute_recharge
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the vehicle to recharge its battery to 100% capacity at the nearest available station.

action_set_definitions.name: move_to_node
action_set_definitions.description: Navigates the vehicle to a target node identifier.

target_node_id.description: The ID of the destination node.

action_set_definitions.name: complete_delivery
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the hand-off of a package at the current location.

package_id.description: The ID of the package to be delivered.

state_description.current_location_id: The unique identifier of the node or coordinate where the vehicle is currently positioned.
state_description.battery_level: The remaining energy of the vehicle as a percentage (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.current_payload_weight: The total weight of packages currently loaded in the vehicle.
state_description.loaded_package_ids: A list of IDs for packages currently inside the vehicle's cargo hold.
state_description.delivery_status_log: A mapping of package IDs to their current status (e.g., 'pending', 'in_transit', 'delivered').
state_description.elapsed_time_seconds: The total cumulative time passed in the simulation since start.
